                y = z

                y = a
                a = 1

                "InputAssignmentError",

                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = a
                y = NOT(a)
                """,
                "MultipleAssignmentError",

            (

                input a
                output y
                """,
                "UnassignedSignalError",

            (

                input a

                y = a

            (

                """\
                input a
                output y
                wire t1
                y = a
                """,
                "UnassignedSignalError",
            ),
            (

                output y
                t1 = a
                y = a
                """,
                "UndefinedNameError",
            ),
        ],
    )

        result, payload = run_json_command(

            ["check", str(path), "--json"],
        )
